original_prompt: Enhance Appointments table to display technician names instead of IDs. Modularize the booking modal into a reusable function for both scheduling and rescheduling. Ensure consistent validation and state hydration for rescheduling.
rephrased_goal: Refactor the Appointments module to improve UX with human-readable tech names and consolidate appointment management into a single, highly-validated modal for both new bookings and reschedules, ensuring strict adherence to business logic.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Analyze Appointments View for Refactoring
subtasks_required: 1.2 Identify the block of booking logic to be modularized
tasks.analogy_reference: examining the trap to see how to make it portable

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Implement Technician Name Lookup Map
subtasks_required: 2.1 Update init logic to fetch users collection
2.3 Update renderAptList to use userMap in table row generation
tasks.analogy_reference: naming every hunter so elders know who is on trail
tasks.testing_criteria: Table displays names instead of hex IDs.

subtasks_required: 3.1 Extract booking logic into openAppointmentModal function
3.2 Add parameter for existingAptData to handle hydration
3.3 Implement hydration logic for form fields, map, and hardware counters
tasks.analogy_reference: making a standard hunt layout that fits any weather (status)
tasks.testing_criteria: Modal opens for both 'Add' and 'Reschedule' with correct data.

subtasks_required: 4.1 Update onsubmit logic to check for existingAptData
4.3 Ensure firebase.logAction is called correctly for both cases
tasks.analogy_reference: sharpening spear for either first throw or retry throw
tasks.testing_criteria: New appointments created, old ones updated, logs match.

subtasks_required: Validate filter performance with the new tech name display
tasks.analogy_reference: checking if all trails lead to same camp
tasks.testing_criteria: No missing pieces, app builds, rescheduling works perfect.
